data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step titled 'Validate persona scenario #2' aimed to confirm the behavior of AI-generated parameters but lacks concrete evidence to support the expected result of either confirming the scenario behavior or producing a clear failure report. The linked use cases and prior steps do not provide any direct evidence related to the validation of AI-generated parameters, leading to a gap in fulfilling the requirement. Specifically, there is no evidence of the simulation or validation process for the AI-generated parameters as outlined in the instruction.
gaps: No evidence of simulation or validation of AI-generated parameters.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for AI-generated parameters validation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete steps and evidence that directly verify the validation of AI-generated parameters.
